# Bootstrap B7 conformance evidence captured on 2026-06-27 from darwin/arm64.
#
# Harness:  @modelcontextprotocol/conformance@0.1.16, suite=active
# Fixture:  internal/integration_testing/conformance-server (streamable HTTP)
# Command:  MCP_CONFORMANCE_SUITE=active ./scripts/mcp-conformance.sh
# Node:     v24.14.1 (the harness needs Node 22+ for fs.globSync)
#
# The active suite is the upstream-curated must-pass set. tmc/mcp passes it
# 100% with no expected-failures file. The wider "all" suite additionally
# includes json-schema-2020-12 (a pending scenario that fails) and
# server-sse-polling (not exercised), so the gate runs "active", matching the
# script default. See docs/design/v1-release-exemplary-gate.md (B7).

node: v24.14.1
npx: @modelcontextprotocol/conformance@0.1.16
command: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/conformance@0.1.16 server --url http://127.0.0.1:<auto>/mcp --suite active
Running active suite (30 scenarios)
